author: Brandjuh
name: MessageManager
description: Role-gated MissionChief direct message manager with Discord forum conversation routing.
install_msg: MessageManager installed. A panel is posted automatically in the configured panel channel. MissionChief conversations are routed to the configured forum channel and the inbox is checked every 15-20 minutes. TAX warning automation is available but disabled by default. Use `[p]mm` to ensure the panel exists, `[p]messagemanager inspect` to inspect the live MissionChief message form, or `[p]messagemanager send <username> | <subject> | <body>` to send an admin-controlled MissionChief DM.

required_cogs.MembersScraper: Provides current alliance member names for safe case-insensitive username resolution

end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persist message contents. It stores MissionChief conversation-to-forum mappings and TAX warning counters, sends MissionChief direct messages through the configured CookieManager session, and may show redacted diagnostics to admins.
